subject: [AAF] Fix AAF Configuration
commit_message:
[AAF] Fix AAF Configuration

set redirect to service providing SSL
add ingress for aaf-oauth

Issue-ID: OOM-2170
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: Iec05ec5798cc8240ca45d7d08c973bc3516f5e8f

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 5 on the queue.

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/4805/ : FAILURE

No problems were identified. If you know why this problem occurred, please add a suitable Cause for it. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/4805/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/4805

Patch Set 1: Verified+1 Code-Review+2

ingress is not being tested in gating, no reason to wait for it.
Jenkins job is broken not because of this patch
Change has been successfully merged by Krzysztof Opasiak

Patch Set 1: Verified+1
